devdoc.details: This contract intentionally has no access control. Records are      caller-submitted data and do not, by themselves, prove Chainlink CRE      provenance, source-data authenticity, or zkVerify verification.

ClimateAlertRecorded(uint256,string,uint.details: publisher is msg.sender and evidenceHash is an unverified reference.

EnvironmentalDecisionAlertRecorded(uint2.details: proofHash is stored as metadata; no proof verification occurs here.

HealthAlertRecorded(uint256,string,strin.details: This event does not assert who produced or approved the source data.

onReport(bytes).details: This entry point is permissionless and does not validate a CRE      forwarder or report signature.

recordEnvironmentalDecisionAlert(string,.details: A nonzero proofHash is required as a reference, but is not verified.

ClimateAlertRecorded(uint256,string,uint.notice: Emitted when a caller submits a climate alert.

EnvironmentalDecisionAlertRecorded(uint2.notice: Emitted when a caller submits a combined environmental decision.

HealthAlertRecorded(uint256,string,strin.notice: Emitted when a health alert is appended.

onReport(bytes).notice: Decodes and stores the health-alert payload used by the demo CRE         workflow.

recordAlert(string,string,string,uint256.notice: Appends a health alert submitted directly by the caller.

userdoc.notice: Demonstration registry for health, climate, and environmental         decision records.

documentation.text:
@notice Emitted when a health alert is appended.
 @dev This event does not assert who produced or approved the source data.

@notice Emitted when a caller submits a climate alert.
 @dev publisher is msg.sender and evidenceHash is an unverified reference.

@notice Emitted when a caller submits a combined environmental decision.
 @dev proofHash is stored as metadata; no proof verification occurs here.
@notice Appends a health alert submitted directly by the caller.
